topic: Can you name the last 5 World Cup Golden Boot winners?

hook.spoken_hook: Name the last five World Cup Golden Boot winners. Bet you miss one.

scenes.voiceover: Name the last five World Cup Golden Boot winners. Bet you miss one.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black bg, a glowing GOLDEN BOOT trophy icon, 'NAME ALL 5?' header, five gold question-mark cards in a row, premium quiz look, vertical 9:16. No faces.

scenes.voiceover: No Googling. Lock in your five top scorers right now. Here we go.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Five numbered slots 2022 down to 2006 with gold borders on black, hidden behind question marks, a ticking-clock motif, premium broadcast quiz board, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty twenty-two. Kylian Mbappé. Eight goals, including a hat-trick in the final.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2022 MBAPPÉ — 8 GOALS' in gold on black with a green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty eighteen. Harry Kane. Six goals — most of them penalties, but they count.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2018 KANE — 6 GOALS' gold on black, green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty fourteen. James Rodríguez. Six goals — and that volley against Uruguay.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2014 JAMES — 6 GOALS' gold on black, green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty ten. Thomas Müller. Five goals — he won it on assists. This is the one everyone forgets.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2010 MÜLLER — 5 GOALS' gold on black, green check mark, a small 'won on assists' note. No faces.

scenes.voiceover: And two thousand and six, Miroslav Klose, five. That's all five — so how many did you actually get?
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2006 KLOSE — 5 GOALS' gold on black, all five winners now lit in a column with check marks, big 'HOW MANY?' prompt. No faces.

scenes.voiceover: Four or more and you really know your football. Follow for your daily World Cup countdown.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black to gold fade, bold white 'SUBSCRIBE' with a gold 'DAILY WORLD CUP' tag, a golden boot icon, a drawn subscribe-arrow, premium broadcast outro, vertical 9:16. No faces.

comment_bait: How many out of 5 did you get? Be honest 👇
cta: Follow for your daily World Cup countdown
music_mood: playful tense quiz ticking that resolves triumphant on each reveal

thumbnail.concept: A golden boot trophy, five gold slots with four years revealed and the most recent hidden behind a question mark

youtube_title: Can You Name the Last 5 World Cup Golden Boot Winners?
youtube_description: Name the last five World Cup Golden Boot winners — 2022 back to 2006. Most people miss the 2010 one (Müller won it on assists). How many did you get? Subscribe for a daily World Cup countdown. #worldcup #goldenboot #football
instagram_caption: Name the last 5 World Cup Golden Boot winners… no Googling. The 2010 one gets everybody. How many did you get? Comment below and tag someone who'd fail.
tiktok_caption: bet you can't name all 5 World Cup Golden Boot winners 🥇 the 2010 one is brutal… how many did you get?
